name: midnight-examples
description: Examples leveraging the Signature Network MPC technology to bring other chains to Midnight. Run `yarn compile` once before `build`/`test` — contract packages typecheck against their generated managed/ output.

scripts.compile: yarn workspaces foreach --all --exclude midnight-examples --topological run compile
scripts.compile:zk: yarn workspaces foreach --all --exclude midnight-examples --topological run compile:zk
scripts.build: yarn workspaces foreach --all --exclude midnight-examples --topological run build
scripts.test: yarn workspaces foreach --all --exclude midnight-examples --topological run test
